self_report.viz_verdict: The shaded numerical integral at a=1 reads 0.239876, matching the asserted \sqrt{\pi}e^{-2}\approx 0.23988 (and the a=2 check gives 0.022955 vs asserted 0.022954).
self_report.notes: Substitution u=\sqrt{a}(\sqrt{t}-1/\sqrt{t}) on the symmetrized integral (1/2)(t^{-1/2}+t^{-3/2}) reduces it to e^{-2a}\int_{-\infty}^\infty e^{-u^2}du/\sqrt{a}; the visual numerical match at a=1,2 confirms it.
